case_title: FRANCISCO SIGUENZA VS. INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIGUENZA, FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTEGRATED MORTGAGE CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,774.83 PRINCIPAL, $19.18 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,999.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
